sentences.target: Unser Team gewinnt heute das Spiel.

translations.de: Unser Team gewinnt heute das Spiel.
translations.en: Our team is winning the game today.
translations.es: Nuestro equipo está ganando el partido hoy.
translations.fr: Notre équipe est en train de gagner le match aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La nostra squadra oggi sta vincendo la partita.
translations.ko: 우리 팀이 오늘 경기에서 이기고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们队今天在这场比赛中领先。
translations.yue: 我哋隊今日呢場波贏緊。
translations.pt: Nosso time está ganhando o jogo hoje.
translations.vi: Đội của chúng ta đang thắng trận hôm nay.
translations.nl: Ons team wint vandaag de wedstrijd.
translations.hi: आज हमारी टीम मैच जीत रही है।
translations.el: Η ομάδα μας σήμερα κερδίζει τον αγώνα.
translations.nb: Laget vårt vinner kampen i dag.
translations.id: Tim kita sedang menang di pertandingan hari ini.
translations.da: Vores hold vinder kampen i dag.
translations.fi: Meidän joukkue on tänään ottelussa johdossa.
translations.ja: うちのチームは今日の試合でリードしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural), no ending here (neuter nominative singular), modifies the subject noun 'Team'.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicates the event and selects subject ('Team') and direct object ('das Spiel').
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Spiel'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'gewinnt'.

sentences.target: Ich mag unser Team im Büro.

translations.de: Ich mag unser Team im Büro.
translations.en: I like our team at the office.
translations.es: Me gusta nuestro equipo en la oficina.
translations.it: Mi piace il nostro team in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢我们办公室的团队。
translations.yue: 我鍾意我哋公司個團隊。
translations.ru: Мне нравится наша команда в офисе.
translations.pt: Gosto da nossa equipe no escritório.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הצוות שלנו במשרד.
translations.vi: Tôi thích nhóm của chúng tôi ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: Ik vind ons team op kantoor leuk.
translations.uk: Мені подобається наша команда в офісі.
translations.hi: मुझे हमारे ऑफिस की टीम पसंद है।
translations.el: Μου αρέσει η ομάδα μας στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Jeg liker teamet vårt på kontoret.
translations.id: Saya suka tim kami di kantor.
translations.sv: Jag gillar vårt team på kontoret.
translations.ro: Îmi place echipa noastră la birou.
translations.cs: Mám rád náš tým v kanceláři.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide vores team på kontoret.
translations.ja: うちの職場のチームが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs an accusative object ('unser Team').
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), here with zero ending (accusative neuter singular), modifies 'Team'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'mag'.
Preposition fused with article (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative and introduces a locative PP ('im Büro').
Common noun, neuter, dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im'.

translations.ja: 君のチームは大きいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), nominative neuter singular; modifies the subject noun 'Team'.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copular auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective (positive degree) serving as the subject complement.

sentences.target: Das Team sucht heute noch eine Person.
sentences.reading: /das tiːm zʊxt ˈhɔʏtə nɔx ˈaɪnə pɛʁˈzoːn/

translations.de: Das Team sucht heute noch eine Person.
translations.ipa: /das tiːm zʊxt ˈhɔʏtə nɔx ˈaɪnə pɛʁˈzoːn/
translations.en: The team is still looking for one person today.
translations.es: El equipo todavía está buscando a una persona hoy.
translations.fr: L'équipe cherche encore une personne aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La squadra sta ancora cercando una persona oggi.
translations.ko: 팀이 오늘 아직 한 명을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 团队今天还在找一个人。
translations.yue: 團隊今日仲喺度搵一個人。
translations.ru: Команда сегодня всё ещё ищет одного человека.
translations.pt: A equipe ainda está procurando uma pessoa hoje.
translations.he: הצוות עדיין מחפש אדם אחד היום.
translations.tr: Ekip bugün hâlâ bir kişi arıyor.
translations.vi: Đội vẫn đang tìm một người hôm nay.
translations.ar: الفريق ما زال يبحث عن شخص واحد اليوم.
translations.nl: Het team zoekt vandaag nog één persoon.
translations.uk: Команда сьогодні ще шукає одну людину.
translations.hu: A csapat ma még keres egy embert.
translations.hi: टीम आज अभी भी एक व्यक्ति की तलाश में है।
translations.pl: Zespół wciąż szuka dziś jednej osoby.
translations.el: Η ομάδα ψάχνει ακόμα ένα άτομο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Teamet leter fortsatt etter én person i dag.
translations.id: Tim masih mencari satu orang hari ini.
translations.sv: Teamet letar fortfarande efter en person i dag.
translations.ro: Echipa încă caută o persoană astăzi.
translations.cs: Tým dnes stále hledá jednoho člověka.
translations.da: Teamet leder stadig efter én person i dag.
translations.fi: Tiimi etsii tänään yhä yhtä henkilöä.
translations.ja: チームは今日まだ一人を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Team'.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a direct object ('eine Person') and is modified by the adverbs 'heute' and 'noch'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Adverb adding aspectual/temporal nuance ('still/yet') to the predicate.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Person'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'sucht'.
